```python
# Step 1: Elute DNA from washed IP beads at 65C, 900 rpm, 30 min
eluate = set_thermal_mixer(sample="washed_ip_beads + dna_elution_buffer", temperature_c=65.0, speed_rpm=900, duration_min=30.0)

# Combined eluate (600 uL total from repeated elutions)
combined_eluate = mix_sample(sample=eluate + " combined 600uL", method="pipetting", duration_s=30.0, speed="gentle")

# Step 2: Reverse crosslinking with Proteinase K at 55C overnight (16 h)
rev_xlink = incubate_sample(sample=combined_eluate + " + proteinase_k_digest_mix", temperature_c=55.0, duration_min=960.0, condition="static")

# Step 3: Prepare MaXtract tube with high-speed spin
prepped_maxtract = centrifuge_sample(sample="maxtract_tube", speed_xg=16000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=25.0)

# Step 4: Add sample + phenol-chloroform-isoamyl alcohol, vigorously mix
loaded_maxtract = mix_sample(sample=prepped_maxtract + " + " + rev_xlink + " + organic_extraction_mix", method="inversion", duration_s=30.0, speed="vigorous")
vortexed_extract = vortex_mix(sample=loaded_maxtract, duration_s=30.0, speed_rpm=2500, temperature_c=25.0)

# Step 5: Phase separation centrifugation
phase_separated = centrifuge_sample(sample=vortexed_extract, speed_xg=16000, duration_min=5.0, temperature_c=25.0)

# Step 6: DNA precipitation with isopropanol + sodium acetate, store at -20C overnight (16 h)
precip_mix = mix_sample(sample=phase_separated + " + dna_precipitation_mix", method="inversion", duration_s=30.0, speed="moderate")
precipitated = store_sample(sample=precip_mix, temperature_c=-20.0, duration_h=16.0, container="freezer tube")

# Step 7: Pellet recovery at 16000 x g, 30 min, 4C
pellet = centrifuge_sample(sample=precipitated, speed_xg=16000, duration_min=30.0, temperature_c=4.0)

# Step 8: Ethanol washes (represented as wash + spin cycles)
wash1 = mix_sample(sample=pellet + " + 70% ethanol", method="inversion", duration_s=15.0, speed="gentle")
wash1_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash1, speed_xg=16000, duration_min=5.0, temperature_c=4.0)
wash2 = mix_sample(sample=wash1_spin + " + 70% ethanol", method="inversion", duration_s=15.0, speed="gentle")
wash2_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash2, speed_xg=16000, duration_min=5.0, temperature_c=4.0)

# Step 9: Dry pellet 5 min at 25C
dried_pellet = dry_sample(sample=wash2_spin, method="air dry", temperature_c=25.0, duration_min=5.0)

# Step 10: Final dissolution in 10 mM Tris-HCl at 37C for 60 min
dissolved_dna = incubate_sample(sample=dried_pellet + " + tris_resuspension_buffer", temperature_c=37.0, duration_min=60.0, condition="static")

# Step 11: Qubit-style fluorometric concentration measurement
qubit_reading = measure_signal(sample=dissolved_dna, assay="Qubit dsDNA HS fluorometric", wavelength_nm=485, replicate_n=1)

# Step 12: Record DNA concentration metric
recorded_conc = record_measurement(sample=dissolved_dna, metric="DNA concentration", unit="ng/uL", note="BL-HiChIP purified DNA concentration by Qubit")
```

```python
tryple_added = add_reagent(sample=washed_plate, reagent="trypLE", volume_ul=500, mixing="gentle swirl")
dissociated = incubate_sample(sample=tryple_added, temperature_c=25.0, duration_min=3.0, condition="static")

# Quench with FACSB
quenched = add_reagent(sample=dissociated, reagent="facsb", volume_ul=1000, mixing="pipette mix")

# Filter through 100-um filter into 5-ml FACS tube
filtered = filter_sample(sample=quenched, filter_type="sterile cell strainer", pore_size_um=100.0, destination="5-ml FACS tube")

# Centrifuge to pellet
pellet1 = centrifuge_sample(sample=filtered, speed_xg=300, duration_min=3.0, temperature_c=25.0)

# Remove supernatant and wash with FACSB
sup_removed1 = collect_fraction(sample=pellet1, phase="supernatant", destination="waste", volume_ul=1500)
facsb_wash = add_reagent(sample=pellet1, reagent="facsb", volume_ul=1000, mixing="pipette mix")
pellet2 = centrifuge_sample(sample=facsb_wash, speed_xg=300, duration_min=3.0, temperature_c=25.0)
sup_removed2 = collect_fraction(sample=pellet2, phase="supernatant", destination="waste", volume_ul=1000)

# Surface staining: antibodies in FACSB, 60 min at 4C protected from light
resuspend_surface = add_reagent(sample=pellet2, reagent="facsb", volume_ul=100, mixing="pipette mix")
surface_ab_added = add_reagent(sample=resuspend_surface, reagent="surface_facs_antibodies", volume_ul=5, mixing="pipette mix")
surface_stained = incubate_sample(sample=surface_ab_added, temperature_c=4.0, duration_min=60.0, condition="protected from light")

# Wash after surface staining
wash_after_surface = add_reagent(sample=surface_stained, reagent="facsb", volume_ul=1000, mixing="pipette mix")
pellet3 = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash_after_surface, speed_xg=300, duration_min=3.0, temperature_c=25.0)
sup_removed3 = collect_fraction(sample=pellet3, phase="supernatant", destination="waste", volume_ul=1100)

# Fixation/permeabilization: 250 ul for 20 min at 4C in the dark
fixperm_added = add_reagent(sample=pellet3, reagent="fixperm_solution", volume_ul=250, mixing="pipette mix")
fixed_perm = incubate_sample(sample=fixperm_added, temperature_c=4.0, duration_min=20.0, condition="protected from light")

# Wash with Perm/Wash buffer
permwash_wash1 = add_reagent(sample=fixed_perm, reagent="permwash_buffer", volume_ul=1000, mixing="pipette mix")
pellet4 = centrifuge_sample(sample=permwash_wash1, speed_xg=300, duration_min=3.0, temperature_c=25.0)
sup_removed4 = collect_fraction(sample=pellet4, phase="supernatant", destination="waste", volume_ul=1250)

# Intracellular staining in 1x Perm/Wash, 20 min at 4C in the dark
ic_buffer_added = add_reagent(sample=pellet4, reagent="permwash_buffer", volume_ul=100, mixing="pipette mix")
ic_ab_added = add_reagent(sample=ic_buffer_added, reagent="intracellular_facs_antibodies", volume_ul=5, mixing="pipette mix")
ic_stained = incubate_sample(sample=ic_ab_added, temperature_c=4.0, duration_min=20.0, condition="protected from light")

# Wash after intracellular staining
permwash_wash2 = add_reagent(sample=ic_stained, reagent="permwash_buffer", volume_ul=1000, mixing="pipette mix")
pellet5 = centrifuge_sample(sample=permwash_wash2, speed_xg=300, duration_min=3.0, temperature_c=25.0)
sup_removed5 = collect_fraction(sample=pellet5, phase="supernatant", destination="waste", volume_ul=1100)

# Final resuspension in 1 ml 1x Perm/Wash buffer
final_suspension = add_reagent(sample=pellet5, reagent="permwash_buffer", volume_ul=1000, mixing="pipette mix")
```

```python
precipitation_incubated = incubate_sample(sample=isopropanol_mixed, temperature_c=4.0, duration_min=10.0, condition="static")

# Step 7: Pellet RNA
rna_pellet = centrifuge_sample(sample=precipitation_incubated, speed_xg=12000, duration_min=10.0, temperature_c=4.0)

ethanol_spun = centrifuge_sample(sample="ethanol_washed_rna_pellet", speed_xg=7500, duration_min=5.0, temperature_c=4.0)

# Step 9: Air dry pellet
dried_pellet = dry_sample(sample=ethanol_spun, method="air dry", temperature_c=25.0, duration_min=10.0)

# Step 10: Resuspend pellet in nuclease-free water (pipetting mix)
resuspended_rna = mix_sample(sample=dried_pellet, method="pipetting", duration_s=30.0, speed="moderate")

# Step 11: Heat RNA at 65 C for 5 min

# Step 12: Quick-chill on ice for 2 min
chilled_rna = cool_sample(sample=heated_rna, temperature_c=0.0, duration_min=2.0, device="ice bath")

# Step 13: Spectrophotometric measurement at 260 nm (quantity)
a260_measurement = measure_signal(sample=chilled_rna, assay="UV absorbance", wavelength_nm=260, replicate_n=2)

# Step 14: Spectrophotometric measurement at 280 nm (purity)
a280_measurement = measure_signal(sample=chilled_rna, assay="UV absorbance", wavelength_nm=280, replicate_n=2)

# Step 15: Record RNA concentration
concentration_record = record_measurement(sample=chilled_rna, metric="RNA concentration", unit="ng/uL", note="Spectrophotometric quantification at A260")

# Step 16: Record 260/280 purity ratio
purity_record = record_measurement(sample=chilled_rna, metric="A260/A280 ratio", unit="ratio", note="RNA purity assessment from spectrophotometry")

# Step 17: Heat RT RNA mix at 65 C for 5 min (denature secondary structure)
rt_mix_heated = heat_sample(sample="rt_rna_mix", temperature_c=65.0, duration_min=5.0, device="heat block")

# Step 18: Quick-chill RT RNA mix on ice for 2 min
rt_mix_chilled = cool_sample(sample=rt_mix_heated, temperature_c=0.0, duration_min=2.0, device="ice bath")
```

```python
ethanol_loaded = mix_sample(sample="ethanol_mix+"+lysate, method="pipetting", duration_s=15.0, speed="moderate")
column_loaded = mix_sample(sample="gdna_mini_column+"+ethanol_loaded, method="pipetting", duration_s=10.0, speed="gentle")

# Binding spin

# Wash 1
wash1 = centrifuge_sample(sample=bind_spin, speed_xg=12000, duration_min=1.0, temperature_c=25.0)

# Wash 2
wash2 = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash1, speed_xg=12000, duration_min=1.0, temperature_c=25.0)

# Extended 2 min drying spin
dry_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash2, speed_xg=12000, duration_min=2.0, temperature_c=25.0)

# Elute with Buffer AE: 3 min RT wait, then spin
ae_applied = mix_sample(sample="buffer_ae+"+dry_spin, method="pipetting", duration_s=5.0, speed="gentle")
ae_wait = incubate_sample(sample=ae_applied, temperature_c=25.0, duration_min=3.0, condition="static")
eluate = centrifuge_sample(sample=ae_wait, speed_xg=12000, duration_min=1.0, temperature_c=25.0)

# Nanodrop measurement

conc_record = record_measurement(sample=eluate, metric="DNA concentration", unit="ng/uL", note="Nanodrop A260 reading for purified gDNA")

# Store purified gDNA at -20 C
stored_dna = store_sample(sample=eluate, temperature_c=-20.0, duration_h=168.0, container="-20C freezer")
```

```python
s1 = add_reagent(sample="phase_sep_sample", reagent="chloroform", volume_ul=1200, mixing="none")

# Step 2: Vortex 15 s at 20 C
s2 = vortex_mix(sample=s1, duration_s=15, speed_rpm=2500, temperature_c=20)

# Step 3: Incubate 5 min at 20 C
s3 = incubate_sample(sample=s2, temperature_c=20, duration_min=5, condition="static")

# Step 4: Phase separation spin 2500 x g, 15 min, 4 C
s4 = centrifuge_sample(sample=s3, speed_xg=2500, duration_min=15, temperature_c=4)

# Step 5: Transfer upper aqueous phase into a fresh vessel
aq = aliquot_sample(sample=s4, destination="fresh_tube_aqueous", volume_ul=600, aliquot_count=1)

# Step 6: Add 1 volume 96-100% ethanol and mix thoroughly
aq_eth = add_reagent(sample=aq, reagent="ethanol_100", volume_ul=600, mixing="pipetting")
aq_eth_mixed = mix_sample(sample=aq_eth, method="pipetting", duration_s=15, speed="thorough")

# Step 7: Load onto Zymo-Spin column and bind
loaded = add_reagent(sample="zymo_spin_column", reagent=aq_eth_mixed, volume_ul=1200, mixing="none")
bind_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=loaded, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=20)

# Step 8: Pre-DNase wash with RNA Wash Buffer
prewash = add_reagent(sample=bind_spin, reagent="rna_wash_buffer", volume_ul=400, mixing="none")
prewash_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=prewash, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=20)

# Step 9: DNase I treatment - 80 uL digestion mix, 15 min incubation
dnase_added = add_reagent(sample=prewash_spin, reagent="dna_digestion_buffer", volume_ul=80, mixing="none")
dnase_incubated = incubate_sample(sample=dnase_added, temperature_c=20, duration_min=15, condition="static")

# Step 10: RNA Prep Buffer wash
prep = add_reagent(sample=dnase_incubated, reagent="rna_prep_buffer", volume_ul=400, mixing="none")
prep_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=prep, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=20)

# Step 11: RNA Wash Buffer - first wash (short spin)
wash1 = add_reagent(sample=prep_spin, reagent="rna_wash_buffer", volume_ul=700, mixing="none")
wash1_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash1, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=20)

# Step 12: RNA Wash Buffer - second wash (long spin to remove residual buffer)
wash2 = add_reagent(sample=wash1_spin, reagent="rna_wash_buffer", volume_ul=400, mixing="none")
wash2_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash2, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=2, temperature_c=20)

# Step 13: First elution with 200 uL RNase-free water into 1.5 mL RNase-free tube
elute1_added = add_reagent(sample=wash2_spin, reagent="rnase_free_water", volume_ul=200, mixing="none")
elute1 = centrifuge_sample(sample=elute1_added, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=20)

# Step 14: Second elution with 200 uL RNase-free water

elute2 = centrifuge_sample(sample=elute2_added, speed_xg=10000, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=20)

# Step 15: Store purified total RNA
```

```python
# Cold processing of extracted lipid sample for LC-MS, plus optional protein pellet cleanup

# Keep extract cold on ice before spinning
cooled_extract = cool_sample(
    sample="glass_vial_extract",
    temperature_c=0.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
    device="ice_bath",
)

# Vortex prior to centrifugation
vortexed_extract = vortex_mix(
    sample=cooled_extract,
    duration_s=15.0,
    speed_rpm=3000,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Cold centrifugation to sharpen phase separation
spun_extract = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=vortexed_extract,
    speed_xg=18000,
    duration_min=5.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Recover hydrophobic (organic) phase by careful pipetting mixing-free transfer
hydrophobic_phase = mix_sample(
    sample=spun_extract,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=30.0,
    speed="slow",
)

# Dry the recovered lipid fraction completely under nitrogen stream
dried_lipids = dry_sample(
    sample=hydrophobic_phase,
    method="nitrogen_stream",
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=30.0,
)

# Reconstitute dried lipid residue in 100 uL 2:1 chloroform/methanol
reconstituted_lipids = mix_sample(
    sample=dried_lipids,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=30.0,
    speed="gentle",
)

# Vortex to ensure full dissolution for LC-MS readiness
lcms_ready_lipids = vortex_mix(
    sample=reconstituted_lipids,
    duration_s=20.0,
    speed_rpm=2500,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# ---- Optional protein pellet cleanup branch ----

# Methanol wash of retained protein pellet (mix to resuspend in wash solvent)
washed_pellet = mix_sample(
    sample="protein_pellet_fraction",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=30.0,
    speed="gentle",
)

# Vortex before spin
vortexed_pellet = vortex_mix(
    sample=washed_pellet,
    duration_s=15.0,
    speed_rpm=3000,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Cold centrifugation of washed pellet
spun_pellet = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=vortexed_pellet,
    speed_xg=18000,
    duration_min=5.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Discard wash supernatant (represented by a pipetting removal step)
decanted_pellet = mix_sample(
    sample=spun_pellet,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=15.0,
    speed="slow",
)

# Dry the cleaned protein pellet for 5 min
dried_pellet = dry_sample(
    sample=decanted_pellet,
    method="air dry",
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
)

# Record readiness of both fractions
lipid_qc = record_measurement(
    sample=lcms_ready_lipids,
    metric="lipid_fraction_ready",
    unit="status",
    note="Reconstituted in 100 uL 2:1 chloroform/methanol; LC-MS ready",
)

protein_qc = record_measurement(
    sample=dried_pellet,
    metric="protein_pellet_ready",
    unit="status",
    note="Methanol-washed, spun, dried 5 min; ready for protein mass measurement",
```
)

```python
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=840.0,
    condition="rotation mixing"
)

# Pellet CIP-agarose beads: 2 min at 16000 x g, 4°C
post_spin = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=exchange_incubated,
    speed_xg=16000,
    duration_min=2.0,
    temperature_c=4.0
)

# Recover supernatant containing exchanged RhoA into a fresh tube
supernatant_fraction = collect_fraction(
    sample=post_spin,
    phase="supernatant",
    destination="fresh_tube_exchanged_rhoa",

)

)

)

    destination="fresh_tube_exchanged_rhoa",
```

```python
)

)
```

```python
capture_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=bound_resin, speed_xg=300, duration_min=2.0, temperature_c=4.0)
captured_pellet = aspirate_supernatant(sample=capture_spin, volume_ul=5000, tool="serological_pipette", preserve_pellet=True)

# Large Regular buffer wash on receptor-bound resin
large_wash = wash_pellet(pellet=captured_pellet, wash_buffer="regular_buffer", volume_ul=20000, repeat_index=1)
large_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=large_wash, speed_xg=300, duration_min=2.0, temperature_c=4.0)
washed_pellet = aspirate_supernatant(sample=large_spin, volume_ul=20000, tool="serological_pipette", preserve_pellet=True)

# Resuspend and split into two 2 mL Protein LoBind tubes at ~250 uL resin per tube
resin_resuspended = resuspend_pellet(pellet=washed_pellet, buffer="regular_buffer", volume_ul=500, method="gentle_pipetting")
split_resin = aliquot_sample(sample=resin_resuspended, destination="lobind_tubes", volume_ul=250, aliquot_count=2)

# Final small-volume wash in the LoBind tubes
final_wash = wash_sample(sample=split_resin, wash_buffer="regular_buffer", volume_ul=1000, repeat_index=1)
final_spin = centrifuge_sample(sample=final_wash, speed_xg=300, duration_min=2.0, temperature_c=4.0)
final_pellet = aspirate_supernatant(sample=final_spin, volume_ul=1000, tool="p1000_pipette", preserve_pellet=True)
```

)

)

)

    speed="gentle",
)

    sample=large_plate_spread,
    temperature_c=30.0,
    duration_min=1080.0,
    condition="static",
)

# Step 5: First LB+amp wash (6 mL) to harvest colonies from the large plate
wash_a_applied = mix_sample(
    sample=large_plate_grown + " + lb_ampicillin_wash_6ml_a",
    method="pipetting",

    speed="gentle",
)

    sample=wash_a_applied,
    method="pipetting resuspension",

)

# Step 6: Second LB+amp wash (6 mL) on the same plate, combined with first harvest

    sample=large_plate_grown + " + lb_ampicillin_wash_6ml_b",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

    sample=pooled_harvest_a + " + " + wash_b_applied,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

)

```python
# Step 1: Combine transformed cells with recovery medium and incubate for outgrowth
recovery_mix = mix_sample(
    sample="transformed_cells_mix + recovery_medium_1ml",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=10,
    speed="gentle",
)

recovered_culture = incubate_sample(
    sample=recovery_mix,
    temperature_c=37.0,
    duration_min=60.0,
    condition="shaking",
)

# Step 2: Dilution-branch plating on 10 cm amp plate for coverage/titer estimation
dilution_plate = mix_sample(
    sample="aliquot_from_" + recovered_culture + " onto ampicillin_lb_agar_10cm_plate",
    method="spread plating",
    duration_s=30,
    speed="gentle",
)

dilution_plate_incubated = incubate_sample(
    sample=dilution_plate,
    temperature_c=37.0,
    duration_min=960.0,
    condition="static",
)

# Step 3: Main library branch - plate 0.5 mL onto pre-warmed 15 cm amp plate
large_plate_spread = mix_sample(
    sample="0.5mL_" + recovered_culture + " onto ampicillin_lb_agar_15cm_plate",
    method="spread plating",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

# Step 4: Incubate large plate ~18 h at 30 C to reduce lentiviral recombination
large_plate_grown = incubate_sample(
    sample=large_plate_spread,
    temperature_c=30.0,
    duration_min=1080.0,
    condition="static",
)

# Step 5: First LB+amp wash (6 mL) to harvest colonies from the large plate
wash_a_applied = mix_sample(
    sample=large_plate_grown + " + lb_ampicillin_wash_6ml_a",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

pooled_harvest_a = mix_sample(
    sample=wash_a_applied,
    method="pipetting resuspension",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

# Step 6: Second LB+amp wash (6 mL) on the same plate, combined with first harvest
wash_b_applied = mix_sample(
    sample=large_plate_grown + " + lb_ampicillin_wash_6ml_b",
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

pooled_harvest_combined = mix_sample(
    sample=pooled_harvest_a + " + " + wash_b_applied,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=60,
    speed="gentle",
)

# Step 7: Homogenize pooled colony suspension into a single downstream sample
pooled_library_suspension = vortex_mix(
    sample=pooled_harvest_combined,
    duration_s=15,
    speed_rpm=1500,
    temperature_c=22.0,
)

# Step 8: Short-term hold prior to plasmid prep
pooled_library_stored = store_sample(

    temperature_c=4.0,

)
```

# Clarify GST lysate at 4°C
clarified_gst = centrifuge_sample(sample="gst_lysate", speed_xg=16000, duration_min=10, temperature_c=4)

# Collect soluble supernatant into pre-cooled 15 mL tube
gst_supernatant = collect_fraction(sample=clarified_gst, phase="supernatant", destination="precooled_15ml_tube", volume_ul=10000)

# Add GST magnetic beads
gst_with_beads = add_reagent(sample=gst_supernatant, reagent="gst_beads", volume_ul=100, mixing="gentle_inversion")

# Incubate with rolling at 4°C for 20 min
gst_bound = incubate_sample(sample=gst_with_beads, temperature_c=4, duration_min=20, condition="rolling")

# Magnetic separation, retain beads
gst_beads_captured = magnetic_separate(sample=gst_bound, rack="magnetic_rack", duration_min=2, collect_phase="beads")

# Wash 1
gst_wash1_add = add_reagent(sample=gst_beads_captured, reagent="binding_buffer_cold", volume_ul=1000, mixing="gentle_inversion")
gst_wash1 = magnetic_separate(sample=gst_wash1_add, rack="magnetic_rack", duration_min=2, collect_phase="beads")

# Wash 2
gst_wash2_add = add_reagent(sample=gst_wash1, reagent="binding_buffer_cold", volume_ul=1000, mixing="gentle_inversion")
gst_wash2 = magnetic_separate(sample=gst_wash2_add, rack="magnetic_rack", duration_min=2, collect_phase="beads")

# Wash 3
gst_wash3_add = add_reagent(sample=gst_wash2, reagent="binding_buffer_cold", volume_ul=1000, mixing="gentle_inversion")
gst_wash3 = magnetic_separate(sample=gst_wash3_add, rack="magnetic_rack", duration_min=2, collect_phase="beads")

# Elute with glutathione elution buffer
gst_elution_add = add_reagent(sample=gst_wash3, reagent="glutathione_elution_buffer", volume_ul=200, mixing="gentle_inversion")

# Magnetic separation to collect eluate (supernatant)
gst_eluate_sep = magnetic_separate(sample=gst_elution_add, rack="magnetic_rack", duration_min=2, collect_phase="supernatant")

# Transfer eluate into ultrafiltration device
gst_eluate = collect_fraction(sample=gst_eluate_sep, phase="supernatant", destination="ultrafiltration_unit", volume_ul=200)

# Concentrate/desalt by centrifugation at 3000 x g, 4°C
gst_concentrated = centrifuge_sample(sample=gst_eluate, speed_xg=3000, duration_min=15, temperature_c=4)

# --- His-tagged LACTB pellet preparation ---
his_pellet = centrifuge_sample(sample="his_bacterial_cells_50ml", speed_xg=3000, duration_min=10, temperature_c=4)

his_cell_pellet = collect_fraction(sample=his_pellet, phase="pellet", destination="precooled_50ml_tube", volume_ul=0)

his_resuspended = add_reagent(sample=his_cell_pellet, reagent="imidazole_buffer_dtt_cold", volume_ul=20000, mixing="gentle_pipetting")

)

)

    sample="first_grna_vector_digest_mix",
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
    device="ice bath",
)

# Step 9: BsmBI_v2 digestion at 55°C for 1 h in NEBuffer r3.1 (2 µg vector / 50 µL)

)

)

)

linearized_vector_stored = store_sample(

    sample=incubated_barcode,
    speed_xg=935,
    duration_min=3.0,
    temperature_c=23.0,
)

# Step 3: Second wash-associated spin to leave pellet as dry as possible
spin2_barcode = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=spin1_barcode,
    speed_xg=935,
    duration_min=3.0,
    temperature_c=23.0,
)

# Document that pellet is left as dry as possible before intracellular staining
dry_pellet_note = record_measurement(
    sample=spin2_barcode,
    metric="residual_supernatant",
    unit="qualitative",
    note="Pellet left as dry as possible prior to intracellular staining",
)

# Step 4: Clarify intracellular antibody master mix (14000 x g, 5 min, 4 °C)
clarified_mix = centrifuge_sample(
    sample="intracellular_master_mix",
    speed_xg=14000,
    duration_min=5.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Document restoration to original volume with 1x Perm/Wash
restored_mix_note = record_measurement(
    sample=clarified_mix,
    metric="volume_restoration",
    unit="uL",
    note="Restored clarified intracellular master mix to original volume with 1x Perm/Wash buffer (perm_wash_buffer)",
)

# Cold-hold the restored master mix at 4 °C until use
cold_mix = cool_sample(
    sample=clarified_mix,
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=5.0,
    device="refrigerator",
)

# Step 5: Model addition of 100 uL intracellular master mix to the barcode batch
stained_batch = mix_sample(
    sample=dry_pellet_note,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=15.0,
    speed="gentle",
)

add_mix_note = record_measurement(
    sample=stained_batch,
    metric="master_mix_added",
    unit="uL",
    note="Added 100 uL of cold clarified intracellular master mix to the barcode batch pellet",
)

# Step 6: 30 min incubation on ice
ice_stain = incubate_sample(
    sample=add_mix_note,
    temperature_c=4.0,
    duration_min=30.0,
    condition="on ice, protected from light",
)

# Step 7: Post-stain cleanup spins
# First post-stain wash with CyFACS buffer
cyfacs_wash = mix_sample(
    sample=ice_stain,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=10.0,
    speed="gentle",
)

cyfacs_wash_note = record_measurement(
    sample=cyfacs_wash,
    metric="wash_buffer",
    unit="identity",
    note="First post-stain wash performed with CyFACS buffer (cyfacs_buffer)",
)

post_stain_spin1 = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=cyfacs_wash_note,
    speed_xg=935,
    duration_min=3.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

# Final wash/resuspension with PBS
pbs_wash = mix_sample(
    sample=post_stain_spin1,
    method="pipetting",
    duration_s=10.0,
    speed="gentle",
)

pbs_wash_note = record_measurement(
    sample=pbs_wash,
    metric="wash_buffer",
    unit="identity",
    note="Final resuspension/wash performed with PBS (pbs_buffer)",
)

post_stain_spin2 = centrifuge_sample(
    sample=pbs_wash_note,
    speed_xg=935,
    duration_min=3.0,
    temperature_c=4.0,
)

final_batch = record_measurement(

)

```python
fractions = []
for i in range(12):
    frac = collect_fraction(
        sample="iodixanol_gradient",
        phase=f"fraction_{i+1}_top_to_bottom",
        destination=f"fraction_tubes[{i}]",
        volume_ul=1000.0,
    )
    fractions.append(frac)

diluted = []
for i, frac in enumerate(fractions):
    d = add_reagent(
        sample=frac,
        reagent="pbs_022um",
        volume_ul=9000.0,
        mixing="gentle inversion",
    )
    diluted.append(d)

spun = []
for d in diluted:
    s = centrifuge_sample(
        sample=d,
        speed_xg=100000,
        duration_min=60.0,
        temperature_c=4.0,
    )
    spun.append(s)

drained = []
for s in spun:
    dr = dry_sample(
        sample=s,
        method="air dry",
        temperature_c=4.0,
        duration_min=2.0,
    )
    drained.append(dr)

resuspended = []
for dr in drained:
    r = add_reagent(
        sample=dr,
        reagent="pbs_022um",
        volume_ul=100.0,
        mixing="vortex",
    )
    resuspended.append(r)

transferred = []
for i, r in enumerate(resuspended):
    t = aliquot_sample(
        sample=r,
        destination=f"storage_tubes[{i}]",
        volume_ul=100.0,
        aliquot_count=1,
    )
    transferred.append(t)

stored = []
for t in transferred:
    st = store_sample(
        sample=t,
        temperature_c=-80.0,
        duration_h=24.0,
        container="sterile storage tube at -80C freezer",
    )
    stored.append(st)
```

loaded_column = filter_sample(sample=pb_mixed_pool, filter_type="silica_membrane", pore_size_um=0.2, destination="wash_ready_column")

# Additional spin to clear residual wash buffer

# Methanol permeabilization

# First FACS buffer wash after methanol
perm_pelleted = centrifuge_sample(sample=perm_incubated, speed_xg=420, duration_min=5, temperature_c=4)

# Second FACS buffer wash

wash2_pelleted = centrifuge_sample(sample=wash2_added, speed_xg=420, duration_min=5, temperature_c=4)
wash2_sup_removed = collect_fraction(sample=wash2_pelleted, phase="pellet", destination="same_tube", volume_ul=0)

# Intracellular staining: 100 uL total = 98 uL FACS buffer + 2 uL antibody

stain_mix = add_reagent(sample=stain_buffer, reagent="phospho_smad23_antibody", volume_ul=2, mixing="gentle pipetting")

# Post-stain wash 2 (200 uL)

post_wash2_pelleted = centrifuge_sample(sample=post_wash2_added, speed_xg=420, duration_min=5, temperature_c=4)
post_wash2_sup_removed = collect_fraction(sample=post_wash2_pelleted, phase="pellet", destination="same_tube", volume_ul=0)

# Final resuspension in 200 uL FACS buffer

# Transfer to flow tube and store at 4 C

stored = store_sample(sample=flow_ready, temperature_c=4, duration_h=12, container="flow_tube")

# Step 3: Brief clarification spin at 500 x g for 0.5 min
clarified_sample = centrifuge_sample(sample=extracted_sample, speed_xg=500, duration_min=0.5, temperature_c=25.0)

# Step 4: Precipitate with 100% isopropanol at -20 C for 2 h (120 min)
precipitated_sample = incubate_sample(sample=clarified_sample + " + 100% isopropanol", temperature_c=-20.0, duration_min=120.0, condition="static")

# Step 5: Pellet DNA at 20000 x g for 30 min at 4 C
pelleted_sample = centrifuge_sample(sample=precipitated_sample, speed_xg=20000, duration_min=30.0, temperature_c=4.0)

# Step 6: Air-dry the pellet for 10 min
dried_pellet = dry_sample(sample=pelleted_sample, method="air dry", temperature_c=25.0, duration_min=10.0)

# Step 7: Resuspend in 5 uL nuclease-free water
resuspended_ssdna = set_thermal_mixer(sample=dried_pellet + " + 5 uL nuclease_free_water", temperature_c=25.0, speed_rpm=800, duration_min=5.0)

# Step 8: Add 20 uL extension reaction mix
extension_reaction = set_thermal_mixer(sample=resuspended_ssdna + " + 20 uL extension_reaction_mix", temperature_c=25.0, speed_rpm=500, duration_min=1.0)

# Step 9: Load into thermal cycler - open lid, close lid
opened_lid = open_thermal_cycler_lid(instrument="thermal_cycler", latch_state="unlocked", plate="extension_reaction_tube")
closed_lid = close_thermal_cycler_lid(instrument="thermal_cycler", latch_state="locked", plate="extension_reaction_tube")

# Step 10: Run reverse-strand extension with lid at 105 C
extension_product = run_thermal_cycler(plate=extension_reaction, program_name="reverse_strand_extension", cycles=1, lid_temperature_c=105.0)

# Step 11: Add 25 uL 2X denaturing loading buffer to produce denatured extension product
denatured_extension_product = set_thermal_mixer(sample=extension_product + " + 25 uL denaturing_loading_buffer_2x", temperature_c=25.0, speed_rpm=500, duration_min=1.0)
